attempts.last_message_excerpt: {"title":"jakal workspace hub","summary":"Freeze the shared GitHub and Jakal-flow sync boundary first so route code can consume normalized provider state without widening contracts, then fan out into two parallel feature passes: one for the GitHub-like project hub and task board, and one for the idea board and Drive-like file organizer. After both branches land, run one explicit integration join to reconcile shell-level summaries and verification in the shared app entrypoints without breaking...
